title: England top air miles among semi-finalists - does it matter?
summary: England has logged more air miles than France and Argentina during World Cup 2026, raising questions about whether extensive travel could affect performance. The article explores whether this logistical factor matters for the semi-finalists.
content: England have travelled far more than rivals France and Argentina as World Cup 2026 tests teams across North America.

zh.title: 英格兰在半决赛队伍中飞行里程最长 - 这重要吗?
zh.summary: 在2026世界杯期间,英格兰的飞行里程数超过法国和阿根廷,引发了关于广泛出行是否会影响比赛表现的问题。文章探讨了这一物流因素对半决赛球队是否具有意义。

title: Borrowed shoes, no Golden Boot - the story of the World Cup's greatest scorer
summary: Just Fontaine's 13-goal World Cup record from decades past remains unmatched, despite his playing career being cut short by injury at age 28. The article traces his remarkable achievement and the circumstances that prevented him from defending his record.
content: Just Fontaine's record of 13 goals in a single World Cup has stood for decades, but he never played in the tournament again after injury ended his career at the age of 28.

zh.title: 借来的鞋,无金靴 - 世界杯最伟大射手的故事
zh.summary: 几十年前朱斯特·方塔纳创造的13球世界杯纪录至今无人打破,尽管他因28岁时的伤病而被迫提前结束职业生涯。文章讲述了他非凡成就的故事,以及阻止他卫冕纪录的种种情况。

title: Celtic boss resigned to losing Engels and Maeda - gossip
summary: Celtic manager Martin O'Neill expects to lose players Daizen Maeda and Arne Engels this summer, while Rangers counterpart Derek McInnes acknowledges needing departures before making new signings. Both Scottish clubs face significant transfer activity ahead.
content: Celtic manager Martin O'Neill expects to lose Daizen Maeda and Arne Engels this summer as Rangers counterpart Derek McInnes admits he needs departures before more signings.

zh.title: 凯尔特人主帅预料会失去恩格尔斯和前田 - 八卦
zh.summary: 凯尔特人队经理马丁·奥尼尔预计今夏会失去球员前田大然和阿恩·恩格尔斯,而流浪者队主帅德里克·麦金尼斯承认在进行新签约前需要球员离队。两家苏格兰俱乐部将面临重大转会活动。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 36
summary: This interactive feature challenges readers to identify a World Cup player in as few guesses as possible, part of an ongoing series.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯球星36号
zh.summary: 这个互动功能挑战读者用尽可能少的猜测来识别一名世界杯球员，是一个持续系列的一部分。

title: These are unprecedented times for England - enjoy them
summary: England has reached four semi-finals in the past five international tournaments, establishing a remarkable record that reflects their current strength as a footballing nation. The article argues this level of consistency should be celebrated rather than taken for granted.
content: A record of four semi-finals in the past five international tournaments for England is outstanding. It is time to accept that this is where England belong.

zh.title: 这是英格兰前所未有的时刻——好好享受
zh.summary: 英格兰在过去五次国际大赛中进入四次半决赛，创造了反映其足球强国地位的杰出纪录。文章主张这种持续的成功应该被庆祝，而非视为理所当然。

title: Bombs, blood, ambushes - football coaching with the army
summary: The Football Association of Wales incorporates military training—including exposure to extreme scenarios like kidnappings and armed conflict—into its Uefa pro licence coaching course. The unconventional program pushes coaches beyond traditional football training boundaries.
content: From kidnappings to invasions, military training takes football coaches out of their comfort zone as part of the Football Association of Wales' Uefa pro licence course.

zh.title: 炸弹、血液、伏击——与军队共进行足球训练
zh.summary: 威尔士足球协会将军事训练纳入其欧足联职业执教证书课程，包括绑架和武装冲突等极端场景的体验。这个非常规项目将教练推向传统足球训练的边界之外。
